subject: EPU folder structure with Warp
body:
Hi

We write EPU K3 Tiff files on the K3 PC SSD array and then copy them to our 
storage server for further processing. I would like to use Warp on the K3 
PC and have it read the files that are in the 
\DoseFractions\EPUSessionFolder\Images-Disk\GridSquarexxxxx\Data\... which 
according to the website isn't possible as all micrographs have to bee in 
the same folder. Ideally  I dont want to use stacker to move the files to 
another location but can do if there aren't other options. Can I ask what 
other EPU users that process files on the K3 PC with Warp are doing?

Thanks


Christos
